applied_this_run.description: Promoted CONF_70_HARD_FLOOR to runtime graduated_rules.json. Penalizes all 60-70% confidence signals by -20 points. Evidence: 123 trades at 46.3% WR, -$2321 PnL — worst confidence bin across all symbols/regimes. Supersedes overlapping CONF_60_70_floor_raise + CONF_60_70_all_block A/B rules.
applied_this_run.verification: 8 rules in data/llm/graduated_rules.json. conf_floor_70_v1 added: penalize -20 for confidence_min=60 confidence_max=70.
